title: Creator Optimized
description: Creator Optimized: is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed to deliver smooth gameplay, enhanced visuals, and quality-of-life improvements without compromising the vanilla feel.
body:
# 🎬 **Creator Optimized – Optimization Modpack** 🎬 **Creator Optimized** is a lightweight, performance-focused Minecraft modpack designed to deliver smooth gameplay, enhanced visuals, and quality-of-life improvements without compromising the vanilla feel. Built primarily for creators, casual players, and low-end PC users, this pack ensures stable FPS, reduced lag, and a refined user experience. --- ## 🔗 **Quick Links**
[![Modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/creator-optimized) [![GitHub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/saikatbangladesh-vip/CreatorOptimized)
--- ## ⚙️ **Loader & Installation**
[![Fabric](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) [![Forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/forge_vector.svg)](https://files.minecraftforge.net/net/minecraftforge/forge/) [![NeoForge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/neoforge_vector.svg)](https://neoforged.net/) [![Quilt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/supported/quilt_vector.svg)](https://quiltmc.org/en/install/)
--- ## 🚀 **Key Features** - Significant FPS boost and lag reduction - Optimized memory usage and faster loading times - Dynamic lighting and smoother rendering - Improved controls and user interface - Carefully selected mods for stability and compatibility --- ## 🧰 **Core Mods Included** - Sodium – Major rendering engine replacement for massive FPS improvements - Lithium – Game logic optimization for better tick performance - Starlight – Advanced lighting engine for faster world lighting - ImmediatelyFast – Improves UI and rendering performance - Indium – Ensures compatibility with Fabric rendering mods - LazyDFU – Speeds up game startup time - Memory Leak Fix – Fixes memory-related issues and improves stability - FPS Reducer – Reduces resource usage when the game is idle - Sodium Extra & Reese’s Sodium Options – Extended graphics settings and customization - LambDynamicLights – Real-time dynamic lighting from entities and items - Zoomify – Smooth zoom functionality - Mouse Tweaks – Enhanced inventory controls - Mod Menu – Easy mod management interface - Wavey Capes – Cosmetic cape animation for visual enhancement …and many more optimization mods working together. --- ## 📈 **Why Use This Modpack?** - Higher and more stable FPS - Reduced lag spikes and stuttering - Faster world loading and chunk rendering - Better gameplay experience on low-end systems - Cleaner and more customizable UI --- ## ⚖️ **Vanilla vs Creator Optimized** | Feature | Vanilla Minecraft | Creator Optimized | |--------|------------------|------------------| | Performance | Average / Laggy on low-end PCs | Smooth and optimized | | FPS | Unstable | Stable & High | | Loading Time | Slower | Faster | | Graphics Options | Limited | Advanced & customizable | | Gameplay Feel | Default | Enhanced but still vanilla-like | --- ## 🎯 **Perfect For** - Content creators (YouTube, streaming) - Low-end PC users - Players who want smooth gameplay without heavy changes - Vanilla+ experience lovers --- ## 📌 **Final Note** This modpack is built with a clear goal: **maximum performance with minimal compromise**. It keeps the core Minecraft experience intact while making everything faster, smoother, and more enjoyable. --- ## 🔗 **Contact Links**
[![YouTube](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/social/youtube-plural_vector.svg)](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9MLcV4rc3kYV0LVoVhwtDA?sub_confirmation=1) [![Discord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/intergrav/devins-badges/v3/assets/compact/social/discord-plural_vector.svg)](http://dsc.gg/saikatbangladesh)
